text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There, the bulletin boards are finished! I'll have everything
princess-perfect in no time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You really don't mind helping me though? Your whole day was almost
ruined because of me.
choice_data_list: Well, it was kind of my fault too.
Well, it was kind of my fault too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're so sweet! You know, if I ran into you and not the wall,
you'd be the one full of holes right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After leaving the office, Kawakami Princess gives me a proper,
heartfelt apology for almost running over me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I apologize as well, explaining that I wanted to help her because I
should've been watching where I was going.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Still, Tracen Academy is huge, isn't it? Getting around the whole
school is going to tire out even a princess like me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She talks about herself as if she's an actual princess. I wonder if that
word has some special meaning to her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, couldn't you tell by looking? Yep, I'm a real-life princess. Just
like Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Tell me you've watched Spitfire Cutie☆Princess Fighter before! Everyone has!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She's a princess who races fair and square against the wicked Dark
Umamusume. She's the strongest warrior there is—Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She never loses heart because of all the love and support she gets
from her prince, Legendary Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've wanted to become a princess since I was a little kid. Everyone
always tells me someone so wild can't be one though...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was the worst. It got me really down, but then Princess
Fighter showed me what to do.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: "A princess is always beautiful, graceful, and courageous!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Even a spitfire can be a princess! That's why I came to Tracen—to
become a strong, brave princess just like Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why's your face all scrunched up?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you think I'm dreaming too big. You wouldn't joke
around like that, right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's my dream—I'm the one who decides it, and I'm the one who will
achieve it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So what if I set high goals for myself? I'm going to be just like Princess
Fighter, then you'll see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm really impressed by her daring attitude. With conviction like that,
I bet she'll become a terrific racer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's this? Oh, if it isn't Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wah! I-it's you! K-King! It's been s-so, er, since morning! Good since
morning!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Good since morning?" I haven't heard that before... Never mind
though. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, you see... It's not like it looks. Air Groove... from the student
council... told me I, uh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you helping the student council now? Good for you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
To become first-rate, one must act the part, and that includes
thankless service... Heh. An admirable effort.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You know, if you need it, I could help out if you want.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Don't be crazy! This is my job, so I've gotta do it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? All right, I'll be on my way then. Keep up the good work.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: She's...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Just wonderful! Perfect! Just look at the way she carries herself so
beautifully!
choice_data_list:
(She's got that look in her eyes like when she
was talking about Princess Fighter!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking—King might be the Umamusume most like Princess
Fighter in the world!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I mean it! She's already perfect! She's got beauty, refinement,
dignity...
choice_data_list: You must really look up to her.
You must really look up to her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I sure do! I've aspired to be like her ever since I saw her the first time
I came to the academy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She's always so grand and majestic. And the way she moves, it's like,
uh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that! She's elegant! That's what really makes a
princess—elegance!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And she complimented me... This won't do at all! I've got to finish these chores on my own!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well, good day to you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(She complimented me! I was complimented by King! I just need to
keep it up a little longer until the tryouts. Then I can be a princess
too!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(A princess... like King... Wait, can I even compare to King—like, be
her equal?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Here, look at this. The princess in this book is well-behaved, isn't
she? If you want to become a princess, you'll have to be nice and
quiet like her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(No way. Is that what Mom was trying to tell me? That if I can't be like
King, I can't become a princess?!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: B-but I'm not anything like her!
